content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1-4.5.3 WARN — App schedules hardcoded hourly repeating marketing push notifications with no user-configurable opt-in/frequency control, and description.txt explicitly advertises "EVERY HOUR... unlimited notifications" (NotificationScheduler.swift:8-12, description.txt:3).
Pierre: Apple explicitly warns against using push notifications for unsolicited promotional spam (4.5.3/4.5.4), and this scheduler hardcodes an hourly recurring marketing push with no user control over frequency, plus the marketing copy brags about "unlimited" hourly alerts. You should add explicit in-app opt-in consent language, let users control frequency, and tone down the "EVERY HOUR/unlimited" marketing claim to avoid triggering a 4.5.4 rejection. Verify there's also an easy in-app opt-out beyond system Settings.
